title: Sweet Escape
description: Close GUI when attacked or when moving, can be toggled which one should be enabled.
body:
**[Aquarius Libs](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquarius-libs)** needs to be installed for this mod to work!

This **client-side** mod automatically **closes** active user interfaces (GUIs / **screens**), 

**whenever** the player **takes damage** or **starts moving**, allowing the player to quickly escape at emergencies.

 ---
 
What It Does:

**Close Screen on Movement:** Pressing any movement keys immediately closes open menus so you can escape dangers quickly (has a configurable cooldown time).

**Close Screen when hurt:** whenever the player takes damage the current screen will close (has a configurable cooldown time).

**Completely independent of server-side setups**

**Config Options:** allow toggles for creative mod(default:false),  close screen when moving(default:true), close screen when hurt(default:true), cooldown time for attacks(default: 15 sec), cooldown time for moving(default: 5 sec), screen list to select what can be closed

**Close from Certain Damage Types:** accepted damage types can be changed with the close_on_damage.json file located in the jars damage_type folder (default: **player attack, mob attack, arrow, explosion, fall, sting, player explosion, mob projectile, fireball, trident, mace smash, thorns, sonic boom, fireworks, lightning bolt**)

 ---
 
Supported Versions

- **Loaders:** Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge.
- **Versions:** 26.1.x
- _Note: No plans to support older versions below 26.1 for now!_

 ---

Found a Bug?

If you encounter any **bugs** or experience a **crash**, please **send** the **crash log** directly to me via **[curseforge private message](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aleni26/projects)** so I can look into it.
